name: @spark/harness-core
description: Spark Genesis Harness canonical runtime contracts

scripts.build: tsc -p tsconfig.json && tsc -p tsconfig.esm.json && node -e "const fs=require('fs'); if (fs.existsSync('ts-dist-esm/index.mjs')) fs.rmSync('ts-dist-esm/index.mjs'); fs.renameSync('ts-dist-esm/index.js','ts-dist-esm/index.mjs')"
